hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|(])[[:space:]]*(rtk[[:space:]]+)?gh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+merge'; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"The owner merges PRs, not the agent (see CLAUDE.md Workflow). Open/update the PR, get it green, then hand off."}}'; fi
